subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-16
subcodes.first_line: How large is the creation of God! How stupendous His machinery! How infinite His dominion!... Were it possible to construct an aeroplane and establish communication between the various planets many marvellous discoveries would have been achieved!
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @plenitude; the pervasiveness of life in the cosmos, @infinity and eternity, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology
